source: NASA JPL MUR SST v4.1 (Multi-scale Ultra-high Resolution) - Puget Sound tile

baseline.note: Long-term monthly-climatology mean used as the anomaly reference. The individual pre-2015 monthly baseline values used to build this mean are not re-served here; the recompute is (observation.mean_c - baseline.mean_c) for a coarse anomaly, or per-month deseasonalized anomaly if the analysis pipeline reconstructs the seasonal cycle.

reprocessing_notes: 2024-11: v4.1 reprocessing pass tightened the Puget Sound coastal mask; monthly means for pre-2020 observations may differ from the frozen chapter snapshot by <= 0.15 deg_C.
2026-03: latest scan-line drift correction applied to 2019-2022 monthly means; the warming anomaly recomputed against this series will land differently from a figure pinned to the pre-2024 baseline.
